summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Chatting Via WhatsApp number assignment feature. All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Map section successfully removed from Lead Overview page.

issues: Console warning: Select is changing from uncontrolled to controlled - minor React state management issue

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/leads returns chattingVia field in lead objects
Backend: GET /api/leads?chattingVia=5235 filters leads correctly (returns 1 lead)
Backend: GET /api/leads?chattingVia=5533 filters leads correctly
Backend: GET /api/leads?chattingVia=0951 filters leads correctly
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id}/chatting-via sets value to 5533
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id}/chatting-via clears value to null
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id}/chatting-via returns 404 for invalid lead ID
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id}/chatting-via requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/leads with chattingVia creates lead correctly
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} with chattingVia updates correctly
Backend: PATCH /api/leads/{id} with chattingVia updates correctly
Backend: Team member can filter leads by chattingVia
Frontend: Lead Overview - No map iframe or 'Open in Maps' button exists (map section removed)
Frontend: Lead Overview - Chatting Via button in Contact Details section with data-testid='chatting-via-btn'
Frontend: Lead Overview - Chatting Via button shows green background when value is set
Frontend: Lead Overview - Click Chatting Via button shows dropdown with 3 options
Frontend: Lead Overview - Options have data-testid='chatting-via-option-{value}' (5235, 5533, 0951)
Frontend: Lead Overview - Selecting a number updates button text and persists to backend
Frontend: Lead Overview - City/State/Address fields are in Contact Details section
Frontend: Lead Overview - Chatting Via label present in Contact Details section
Frontend: All Leads - Chatting Via filter dropdown with data-testid='filter-chatting-via'
Frontend: All Leads - Filter dropdown shows 'All Numbers', '...5235', '...5533', '...0951' options
Frontend: All Leads - Filtering by Chatting Via=5235 shows 1 lead (kaushik - alkaran events)
Frontend: All Leads - Clear Filters button visible when filter is active
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React controlled/uncontrolled component warning in All Leads filter - consider initializing chattingViaFilter state with empty string instead of undefined
seed_data_creation: One lead (kaushik - alkaran events) already has chattingVia='5235' set in the database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chatting Via feature fully tested. Key data-testids: chatting-via-btn (Lead Overview button), chatting-via-option-{5235|5533|0951} (dropdown options), filter-chatting-via (All Leads filter). The 3 WA numbers are '5235', '5533', '0951' (last 4 digits). Map section has been removed from Lead Overview - no iframe or 'Open in Maps' button exists. City/State/Address fields are now in Contact Details section alongside Chatting Via.
